OrderDetails.AddItemSearchInput: (//div[@role='dialog' and @data-state='open'][.//*[normalize-space()='Add Item' or normalize-space()='Add Items']]//input[@data-name='search-input' or @placeholder='Search' or @type='text'])[1]
OrderDetails.AddItemSearchSecondResult: ((//div[@role='dialog' and @data-state='open'][.//*[normalize-space()='Add Item' or normalize-space()='Add Items']]//*[@role='option' or @cmdk-item])[2] | (//div[@role='dialog' and @data-state='open'][.//*[normalize-space()='Add Item' or normalize-space()='Add Items']]//li[.//span or .//p])[2])[1]
OrderDetails.AddItemQuantityIncreaseButton: (//div[@role='dialog' and @data-state='open'][.//*[normalize-space()='Add Item' or normalize-space()='Add Items']]//*[contains(normalize-space(),'Qty.')]/following::button[@data-name='quantity-increase' or normalize-space()='+' or .//*[contains(@class,'plus')]][1])[1]
OrderDetails.AddItemPriceInput: (//div[@role='dialog' and @data-state='open'][.//*[normalize-space()='Add Item' or normalize-space()='Add Items']]//*[contains(normalize-space(),'Price per Item')]/following::input[@data-name='price-per-item' or @id='price' or @type='number'][1])[1]
